response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014-2015) and a university thesis project, falling far short of the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ required. The professional career is focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web, GIS, and direct-mail platforms — there is no Windows-platform C++ work, no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MongoDB and MySQL), and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The mandatory technical and domain requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some early-career C/C++ work at National Instruments on a measurement IDE
Strong communication signal via workshops, conference talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months and over a decade old; no recent production C++ work
No SQL Server or Oracle experience and no demonstrated Windows-platform development
Zero exposure to fixed income, derivatives, investment banking, or capital markets domains

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows focus
